body:
The landscape shifts every day. New research, policy changes, patient stories — the global conversation around medical cannabis moves faster than most people realise. Here's what's happening today.

CQC Concerns Add to Scrutiny of UK's Private Medical Cannabis Sector

The latest developments in the UK medical cannabis space continue to shape the conversation around patient access and regulatory reform. With clinics expanding and awareness growing, the sector is at a pivotal moment — one that patients, advocates and policymakers alike are watching closely.

The latest developments in the UK medical cannabis space continue to shape the conversation around patient access and regulatory reform. With clinics expanding and awareness growing, the sector is at a pivotal moment — one that patients, advocates and policymakers alike are watching closely.

Is Cannabis Effective for ADHD?

The latest developments in the UK medical cannabis space continue to shape the conversation around patient access and regulatory reform. With clinics expanding and awareness growing, the sector is at a pivotal moment — one that patients, advocates and policymakers alike are watching closely.

Why this matters

Every update we track is part of a larger story — the normalisation of cannabis as medicine, the fight for patient rights, and the cultural shift towards acceptance and understanding. At The Ganja Club, we don't just report the news. We contextualise it.

Stay informed. Stay engaged. The conversation continues.
